milestone: #1 Plugin / Extension System: declarative local extension foundation, not executable plugin ecosystem
summary: Read-only demo that walks the full v1 plugin/extension flow over the fixture plugin pack: local registry discovery, manifest validation, valid descriptor rendering, blocked diagnostics for invalid fixtures, plugin evidence output, and read-only dashboard/Studio inspection. The demo discovers declarative descriptors only; it never executes plugins, installs dependencies, contacts the network, mutates source, publishes, or deploys.

stages.coverage: Local registry discovery scans the fixture plugin pack read-only.
stages.expected: Deterministic registry with valid, invalid, and incompatible entries; no plugin code is executed.

stages.coverage: Valid plugins contribute declarative descriptors only.
stages.check: Valid entries expose declared capabilities and extension points.
stages.expected: Valid descriptors appear in the registry/read model; nothing is run.

stages.coverage: Invalid plugins (arbitrary JS, blocked capability, unsafe path) fail closed.
stages.check: Invalid entries report validation diagnostics and contribute no extension points.
stages.expected: Blocked diagnostics are visible; invalid plugins contribute nothing.

stages.coverage: A legacy-schema plugin is reported as incompatible, not silently accepted.
stages.expected: The incompatible plugin is surfaced without execution.

stages.coverage: Plugin registry evidence validates and exposes a read model.
stages.expected: Evidence parses and read model serializes for read-only inspection.

stages.coverage: Evidence that declares executable capability or unsafe descriptors fails closed.
stages.expected: Validation rejects the unsafe evidence before it is treated as trusted.

stages.coverage: Dashboard/Studio inspection of descriptors is read-only.
stages.expected: The boundary states read-only, declarative discovery only, with no plugin execution and no trusted writes.

guardrails: This demo enables declarative, allowlisted, evidence-backed plugin discovery and extension descriptors, not arbitrary plugin execution.
No arbitrary JavaScript execution, native dynamic library loading, shell command execution, dependency installation, network plugin install/update, marketplace, or credential access.
No source mutation, export mutation, publish/deploy action, or CI/workflow mutation.
Browser/dashboard/Studio surfaces remain read-only inspection/rendering surfaces; they cannot install, update, enable executable code, run commands, publish, deploy, sign, or upload.
Plugin outputs, generated registries, validation reports, and evidence artifacts stay generated and ignored unless fixture-scoped.
No production-ready plugin ecosystem, secure plugin sandbox, marketplace readiness, command bridge, or current Godot replacement claim.
